name: Sunset afterglow
short_description: This is a super fun casual game
detailed_description:
This is a super fun casual game, simple and clear, refreshing and pleasant, reflecting the consistent style of casual games. The gameplay is simple, controlling the chess pieces to jump forward. Players use the left button to accumulate power and accumulate a certain score every time they pass a point. This is a comprehensive test of the player's visual ability, finger priority and urgency operation ability, and distance control ability, which greatly tests their patience. Come and give it a try!
Gameplay
Hold down the left mouse button to accumulate power. When you release the left button, the flag will jump forward.
Please pay attention to controlling the force.
When the flag does not jump, you will fail
